articles.title: Ben McKenzie has a new crypto documentary
articles.summary: Actor Ben McKenzie releases a new cryptocurrency documentary, following his previous work on crypto-related content.

articles.title: How Jeffrey Epstein tried to pressure Bill Gates
articles.summary: Forbes reports on Epstein's attempt to leverage personal connections to influence Bill Gates for tax management purposes.

articles.title: Amazon expands access to its Health AI agent
articles.summary: Amazon announces broader availability of its HIPAA-compliant Health AI tool for answering medical questions and connecting users to healthcare professionals.

articles.title: Amazon adds guardrails around AI coding after AWS outages
articles.summary: Amazon implements stricter oversight for AI-assisted coding changes following service outages, requiring senior engineer approval for modifications.

articles.title: Google and Tesla collaborate on power grid efficiency
articles.summary: Tech giants join Utilize initiative to improve power grid efficiency through battery storage and virtual power plant strategies.

articles.title: Thinking Machines Lab partners with Nvidia
articles.summary: AI startup founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati announces strategic partnership with Nvidia for AI model training infrastructure.

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro to support cloud gaming
articles.summary: Nvidia announces CloudXR 6.0 support for visionOS 26.4, enabling cloud gaming on Apple Vision Pro with GeForce NOW Playtest.

articles.title: DJI teases first 360-degree drone
articles.summary: DJI announces Avata 360, their first 8K 360-degree drone, scheduled for launch on March 26th as a follow-up to the 2024 Avata 2.

articles.title: Niantic finds customer for Pokémon Go world map
articles.summary: Pokémon Go developer Niantic secures a business customer for their comprehensive world mapping technology.

articles.title: Furby: The AI story behind the 1990s toy phenomenon
articles.summary: Tech history exploration of how Furby represented early AI and human-gadget interaction philosophy in toy form.
